CleanClicks v3.0
================

HOW TO USE:
1. Keep CleanClicks.exe and cleanclicks.html in the SAME folder
2. Double-click CleanClicks.exe
3. Your browser opens automatically - app is ready!

If Windows shows a warning:
  Click "More info" then "Run anyway"
  CleanClicks is free and safe - no malware.

TO CLOSE: close your browser or end CleanClicks in Task Manager.
